name: Spanish Style Chicken & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a 13 x 9 inch baking or roasting pan, combine oil with garlic and heat in the oven for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in uncooked rice until coated with oil.
4. Add onion soup mix blended with hot water; stir in peas, bell peppers, and olives.
5. Press chicken pieces into the rice mixture.
6. Bake for 35 minutes or until chicken is done and rice is tender. Cover and let stand 10 minutes before serving.
